item.title: Version 1.7.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.7.0

✨ New Features

  • Privacy Mode — local screens dim while streaming, just like Apple's Screen Sharing. All displays restore automatically when streaming ends.
  • Dynamic Resolution — adaptive streaming for every client. When a connected device rotates, resizes, or switches multitasking layouts, the Mac stream reshapes in place to match — instantly.
  • Custom Resolution, any size and orientation — exact dimensions honored, every time.

⚙️ Improvements

  • Better long-term Mac responsiveness — fixed slow accumulation of stale color profiles that would build up over many sessions.

🐛 Bug Fixes

  • External monitors reliably restore after disconnect (no more "must restart Mac" recovery).
